name: Public Sector IT Solutions
description: Specialized IT solutions for government agencies, municipalities, education, and healthcare institutions. Includes framework-contract-based procurement, security-cleared consulting, compliant cloud solutions, and digitalization programs aligned with German public sector requirements (OZG, BSI).
target_audience: Public sector CIOs, municipal IT departments, education institutions
differentiators: Established public sector framework contracts (Kaufhaus des Bundes, etc.)
Deep understanding of German public sector procurement regulations
